_meta.description: ErgBio enzyme knowledge base. Update lot_number, supplier_notes, and observed_performance as new enzyme lots are used.

enzymes.known_strengths: High beta-glucosidase activity reduces cellobiose accumulation. Strong on switchgrass and corn stover.
enzymes.known_limitations: Performance drops significantly above 55°C. Sensitive to high acetic acid.
enzymes.ergbio_notes: Primary enzyme for EH runs. Update lot_numbers_used as new lots are tested.

enzymes.known_strengths: Well-characterized, extensive literature baseline. Good on pretreated corn stover.
enzymes.known_limitations: Lower beta-glucosidase activity vs CTec3 — cellobiose accumulation at low loadings.
enzymes.ergbio_notes: Previous generation — useful for literature comparisons. Update if used at ErgBio.

enzymes.known_strengths: Good thermostability up to 55°C. Effective on hardwoods and switchgrass.
enzymes.known_limitations: Less documented for high-solids loading than CTec3.

SB.notes: Primary ErgBio feedstock. High xylan content — xylose conversion important for full sugar utilization.

RS.notes: High silica content can affect enzyme accessibility.

CS.notes: Most extensively studied lignocellulosic feedstock — strong literature baseline.

ALB.notes: Hardwood. Higher lignin may require more aggressive pretreatment.
